---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement for ClawLens
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem & impact

<!-- What's the user-facing pain? Be concrete. Who's affected, how often, what's the workaround today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like ClawLens to do. Sketch the UX, CLI, config shape, or API surface if relevant. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches and why you didn't pick them. "Don't know" is acceptable. -->

## Scope

<!-- Which area does this affect? Pick one or more. -->

- [ ] **Risk scoring** (Tier-1 scorer, LLM Tier-2 evaluation, exec parser)
- [ ] **Guardrails** (block / require_approval / allow_notify, match patterns)
- [ ] **Dashboard** (fleet view, agent detail, sessions, activity, guardrails page)
- [ ] **Audit log** (format, querying, export, retention, hash chain)
- [ ] **Alerts** (Telegram, future channels)
- [ ] **Plugin SDK / OpenClaw integration**
- [ ] **CLI** (`clawlens init`, `clawlens audit export`)
- [ ] **Configuration / installation**
- [ ] **Documentation**
- [ ] **Other:**

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, related issues, your OpenClaw gateway version. -->
